title: Uncrafted
description: This pack replaces items with images of their own recipes
body:
This pack replaces items with images of their own recipes. That's it.

You can see examples in Images tab or in the spoiler below.



There are no special requirements to mods or anything else. But if you want more random stupidity, I recommend also to download these packs:

[Leviosa](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/leviosa)

[Spyglass of memes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-what-spyglass)



Or maybe try my other packs:

[Connected World](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-world-16x)

[Giantcraft Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/giantcraft-reborn)

[Original Art](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/original-art)



Have fun! :)



Short video showcase:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_b7tVQsQPTw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>













Anybody is free to use this pack anywhere. Just do not rename the pack, please.



If you have any questions or you want to support what I do:
